overview: Nirman360 is a professional architectural platform for designing residential and commercial structures. It features a complete 3D Building Design System where users input plot details, building type, floors, and budget to get an interactive 3D model with step-by-step construction stages, material specifications, and dynamic cost estimation. The platform has tiered access (Free, Premium, Ultra Premium) with a full design catalog, cost calculator, and user dashboard.
features: Interactive 3D Building Design System with React Three Fiber
Multi-step input form for plot size, location, building type, floors, budget, and style
360° rotatable 3D building model with zoom controls
Layer-by-layer construction stage visualization (Foundation, Structure, Electrical, Finishing, Interior)
Dynamic material specification with quantity estimates and brand suggestions
Real-time cost breakdown by material, labor, and finishing
Tiered access: Free (basic 3D), Premium (full stages + materials), Ultra Premium (full customization)
Design catalog with filters by category, tier, budget, and area
Interactive cost calculator by region and material grade
User dashboard with saved designs and inquiry tracking
